attribue: User is passionate about Harry Potter

attribue: User enthusiastic about fans coming together

message: [17]: The user visits the Harry Potter themed places in London with positive feelings towards these experiences.
raw_message: I went to a place in London a few years ago - it was like walking into a Harry Potter movie! I also went on a tour which was amazing. Have you been to any of the real Potter places? I'd love to explore them someday!
reason: Harry Potter was a great place.
